title: CLAUDE.md: proxy feature not reflected in quick-start or sources-of-truth table
description: CLAUDE.md contains a quick-start section and a sources-of-truth table but neither mentions the --proxy flag or the SOCKS5/proxy feature. The 'Available CLI Tools' section in the global CLAUDE.md mentions ngrok for tunnels but nie's own CLAUDE.md does not document --proxy. Since agents use CLAUDE.md as their primary reference for this project, a new agent working on proxy-related tasks would not know the feature exists from CLAUDE.md alone. Fix: add --proxy to the quick-start examples and note the config.toml proxy field in the sources-of-truth table row for config.rs.
